message:
wip: experimental native type stripper v2 (removed)

Rewrote native_transpiler.zig to use token-based SIMD scanner for
TypeScript to JavaScript transformation. Now handles:

- Function declarations with type annotations
- Arrow functions with parameter/return types
- Interface declarations (removed entirely)
- Type alias declarations (removed entirely)
- Import/export statements (type imports removed)
- Class declarations with implements, generics
- Generic type parameters <T>
- Access modifiers (public/private/protected removed)

Added arena allocator optimization for zero-cost batch allocation:
- Standard allocator: 47.8x faster than Node.js
- Arena allocator: 209.5x faster than Node.js

Benchmark results (realistic 790-byte module):
- Node.js TypeScript: 390µs
- EdgeBox arena: 1.86µs (209.5x speedup)
